name: Beer & Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 11 fluid ounces Beer (use a can or bottle - and save a swallow for the cook!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add diced onions, celery, carrots, and mushrooms. Sauté until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in flour and dry mustard. Cook for 1 minute to remove raw flour taste.
4. Gradually add chicken or vegetable stock while stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add broccoli florets and stems cut into bite-sized pieces. Steam until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
7. Stir in beer and grated cheddar cheese. Return to a gentle simmer and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve the soup hot, topped with reserved broccoli florets in individual bowls.
